import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut parts: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b_opt = string.byte_at(input, i)
    match b_opt
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            parts = list_push(parts, v)
          when None
            return Err("parse failed")
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      parts = list_push(parts, v)
    when None
      return Err("parse failed")
    end
  end
  let a = parts.get(0).ok_or("missing A")?
  let b = parts.get(1).ok_or("missing B")?
  let r = a * a + b * b
  print("r=#{r}")
  Ok(())
end

fn list_push(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  __list_int_push(xs, x)
end
